And the producers of sparks [when] strikingFootnote-2
Arriving thereby in the centerFootnote-4 collectively,
Indeed mankind, to his Lord, is ungrateful.
And indeed, he is to that a witness.Footnote-5
And indeed he is, in love of wealth, intense.
But does he not know that when the contents of the graves are scattered
And that within the breasts is obtained,Footnote-6
Indeed, their Lord with them, that Day, is [fully] Aware.Footnote-7
